etymology.description: Variant form of 廿(廿) (niàn, "twenty"). 廿: Two 十(十) (shí, "ten") side by side with a horizontal stroke at the bottom -> representation of twenty
etymology.interpretation: 卄(卄) (niàn, "twenty") is a variant of 廿(廿) (niàn, "twenty"), which visually represents the number twenty by combining two 十(十) (shí, "ten") characters horizontally.
